title: Netherite Disabler
description: Admins can enable/disable a specific Netherite Crafting recipe with a GUI
body:
![main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e65f4765f09086dac6aaf7f9887827468e4414d5_0.webp)

![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/172968d3b79c8a0d636866080c1f7a833dd4eb38.jpeg)
### Features:
Able to Disable/Enable Netherite items using config/command/gui
Able to Adjust the messages to your liking

### List of Tools/Armor you can disable
- Sword
- Pickaxe
- Axe
- Hoe
- Shovel
- Helmet
- Chestplate
- Leggings
- Boots

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e20b4e615617a9ba8871611b767e6caff158438_0.webp)
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/665662cfee612cdefb5acf2335d47b9efdc983da.png)

![Commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7100debb922bb47d69ba3759623ed2ca80465679.jpeg)
- /nd reload - Reloads the config.yml
- /nd [disable|enable] [tool|armor] - disables a specific tool or armor
- /nd GUI - opens the gui


![Perms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bec2976cccbb910a138062aa549628d8e0bada02_0.webp)
- netheritedisabler.craft.[Item] -  Allows crafting of a certain Item
- netheritedisabler.admin - Allows using the [disable | enable | Gui | reload] commands


![support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0615a28010d2d3d7a36ccc413b64dc817aae87b9.jpeg)
Join our wonderful discord for support: https://wild-trails-development.gitbook.io/heroicstudios
